feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP B1 Bin Location Storage suggestion algorithm
entry.content:
Hello,

Based on a requirement from a customer, we have bin locations, each with a specific format type.

Let’s take an example with the format: PAL.

We would like the system to calculate the volume for each item with the PAL format. The calculation would be based on the formula:
UVF = (Height x Width x Length) x Quantity

The system should then suggest the best bin location with the PAL format that is not already full.

For example:

  • Bin Location A-01, format: PAL, is currently at 90% of its maximum Unit of Volume Format (UVF).
  • Bin Location A-02, format: PAL, is at 20% of its UVF.

If we have an item with a volume of 20 UVF, the system would propose storing it in A-02, as it has more available capacity.

Regarding the system's ability to make such proposals, this functionality would require development. However, I would like to know how this could be achieved using SBO transactions or procedures.

Thanks,

entry.title: How to Install SSL Certificate for SAP B1 Web Browser Access
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to install an SSL certificate for SAP Business One 10 web browser access, I have a Public IP address. How can I do this?

entry.title: Error when creating Production Order
entry.content:
Hello Community,


When creating purchase order , system is generating this error " No matching records found 'Warehouses' (OWHS) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]"

Any idea about this ?

entry.title: list of items field is not displaying (SAP b1)
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

May I ask why ITEM COST field is not seeing in list of items report. while in form setting the field is yet available and visible either.

 

List of items

Form settings

 

 

TYIA

entry.title: b1if, use of table name and table field name in payload
entry.content:
the following payload used to work in b1if for creating BOM, but it no longer works after upgrading to version 2411.  

now instoad of <OITT> it has to be <ProductTrees>. 

anyone knows why? 

 

<BOM>
  <BO>
    <AdmInfo>
      <Object>66</Object>
    </AdmInfo>
    <OITT>
      <row>
        <Code>A00001</Code>
      </row>
    </OITT>
    <ITT1>
      <row>
        <Code>R300004</Code>
        <Quantity>1.0</Quantity>
        <Type>290</Type>
      </row>
      <row>
        <Code>A00002</Code>
        <Quantity>1.0</Quantity>
        <Type>4</Type>
      </row>
    </ITT1>
  </BO>
</BOM>

entry.title: Not able to post good receipt and GRPO document, system is generating error
entry.content:
Hello Community ,

When selecting add button in Good Receipt & GRPO document, system is showing this error "Cannot proceed; define inventory account for warehouse, item group, or item" need guidance for this.

entry.title: Error : Production Order change status : CLOSE
entry.content:
Have a problem closing a production order which changes status from release to close. That show error message : 

The instance of the SQL Server Database Engine cannot obtain a LOCK resource at this time. Rerun your statement when there are fewer active users. Ask the database administrator to check the lock and memory configuration for this instance, or to check for long-running transactions.

But some production order which changes status from plan to release to close is not problem.

Firstly : Checking database :  sessionid or processid is not LOCK.

Pls. help to solve this problem.  SAP 9.3 PL11, MSSQL 2014

entry.title: 'Document Type' doesn't match the values in 'Layout and Sequence' list
entry.content:
Hello experts.

I have created a crystal report layout for my SAP B1 A/R correction invoices and imported it on the system.

In my 'Report and Layout manager', code 'CSI4' is set for A/R correction invoices' layouts.

Then, when I open an already existing correction invoice and click on 'Preview' to view the report, I get these error messages:

No matching records found 'Document Type List' (RTYP) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]
No matching records found 'Document' (RDOC) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]

When I click on 'Layout designer' and the 'Layout and Sequence window' opens, the 'Document Type' is automatically set as 'CSI2' in the dropdown list. However when I open the list, CSI2 doesn't exist in it + when I checked RTYP table(Document Type List), there's no 'CSI2' code defined, it only has CSI3 and CSI4.

I have also noticed that I can't even see SAP's own PLD layout for correction invoices. The same error messages appear when I set it as my default layout and click preview so I guess there's nothing wrong with my Crystal report and the problem lies somewhere else.

I'm new to SAP B1 and I'd really appreciate any help.

entry.title: SQL OEM Licence by SAP
entry.content:
We are reaching out on behalf of our customer,who holds a SQL OEM license supplied by SAP. They have a few queries related to their licensing needs and we would appreciate your guidance on the following:

  1. Provision for Failover Replication
    Customer is planning to implement failover replication for their SQL database and would like to know if it is possible to obtain a copy of the license to be installed on both the live and replication servers. Could SAP provide an additional license copy for this purpose, or would they need to purchase a new license?
  2. License Binding to Hardware or Virtual Machines
    We need clarification on whether the SQL OEM license supplied by SAP is locked to specific hardware or the virtual machine (VM). If the customer moves their VM from one host to another, will the existing license key remain valid?
  3. Non-SAP Staging Database Usage
    Is it permissible to host a non-SAP staging database on the same SQL Server that is OEM licensed by SAP?

 Please let us know if any additional information or documentation is needed to assist with the evaluation.

 

Looking forward to your response

entry.title: Signing in to SAP Business one with Two Factor Authentication
entry.content:
Dear   All,

Anyone have implemented SAP Business one client with Two Factor Authentication.

I would like to implement signing in to SAP Business one client with Two Factor Authentication.

For this help is about signing to SLD , not client. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_IAM/548d6202b2b6491b824a488cfc447343/e2c7c60268934432a0639d014d7fcdf2.html

Please advise me. Thank you.

Best Regards,

Peearput N.

entry.title: Wanted to Hide Form Settings in the Menu Bar in SAP Business One
entry.content: I wanted to hide the Form Settings button in the Main Menu marked in the attached screenshot, is there a way in SAP Business One for 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.240) SP 2402 (Security) HOTFIX1 (64-bit) ?

entry.title: electronic document service installation failed
entry.content:
The upgrade installation of electronic document service post-upgrade failed.

I was able to upgrade to SAP Business One FP204HF02. Now i want to update to SP2411 but the EDS installation always fails.

The logfile shows following abnormalities:

 

[12:09:24][AM FEINSTEN] [OUTPUT1] EDSDeploymentTool execution failed with exception `HttpRequestException`: Request to server responded after 3 tries

[12:09:24][AM FEINSTEN] [OUTPUT1] [0;37;41;1m2025-01-24 12:09:24,061 ERROR [ 1] [EDFBackend.EDSDeploymentTool.Program]: EDSDeploymentTool execution failed with exception `HttpRequestException`: Request to server responded after 3 tries

[12:09:24][AM FEINSTEN] [OUTPUT2] Target installation environment is corrupted. Required dependency SLD and SL services are missing.

best regards

Markus

entry.title: UomEntry in ITM12 is created with not aspected value
entry.content:
In UGP1 I have a group with code = 1, and 5 unit of measure

With this code, I create a new Item

 

Items item = ((Items)(myCompany.GetBusinessObject(BoObjectTypes.oItems)));

item.ItemCode = "NewCode";
item.ItemName = "Item NewCode";
item.UoMGroupEntry = 1;
item.UnitOfMeasurements.UoMType = ItemUoMTypeEnum.iutInventory;
item.UnitOfMeasurements.UoMEntry = 5;
int retCode = item.Add();
if (retCode != 0)
{
    string retStr;
    myCompany.GetLastError(out retCode, out retStr);
    Assert.Fail("Item record not insert: " + retStr);
}
Assert.AreEqual(0, retCode);

System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal.ReleaseComObject(item);
System.Runtime.InteropServices.Marshal.FinalReleaseComObject(item);

 

When I try to excecute this code, in OITM I found a new record with ItemCode = "NewCode", but the value in ITM12 on the field UomEntry is 1 (not 5).

Why is the UomEntry field not valued at 5, as required by my code?

 

Thanks

Riccardo

entry.title: how we can write complaint to SAP about our SAP partner and novation process?
entry.content:
I want to know the process to write complain about our SAP partner and also it would be great if you guys update me about the novation process.

Regards,

entry.title: Printing outgoing payment form when added thru AP Invoice (payment means)?
entry.content:
Hi,

In my User Defaults settings for outgoing payments, it is already set to print when adding document.

When I add AP Invoice with payment means, it will automatically add Outgoing payment but the problem is it will not print.

Any way we can auto print when adding outgoing payments thru AP Invoice?

Thank you!

entry.title: Unkown numbers in query's
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone explain to me what the following numbers are doing and where they are coming from?

$[$38.44.0]

$[$20.0.0]

$38.44.0

This is the full query:

 

SELECT
CASE $[$38.44.0]
WHEN '' THEN (SELECT DISTINCT(T0.[WareHouse])
FROM OUDG T0
WHERE T0.[SalePerson] = $[$20.0.0])

ELSE (SELECT T1.[WhsCode]
FROM ORDR T0 INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry = T1.DocEntry
WHERE T0.[DocNum] = $[$38.44.0] AND T1.[LineNum] = $[$38.46.0])
END

entry.title: Not able to login SAP
entry.content:
Hello Community,
When trying to login to SAP ( SQL Environment ), system is generating this message and not showing any company in the company list.

 

What is the possible reason for this ?

entry.title: SYSTEM VARIABLES IN PLD
entry.content:
Good afternoon Experts,

We have the following scenario: we are trying to add the field OJDT.NUMBER from the Journal Entry module to the PLD "INVENTORY POSTING LIST" in the "REPETITIVE AREA."

However, when we add it, the system does not display anything in the repetitive area. We have searched through SAP Notes and SAP Help for any information, but we have not found any relationship or relevant information.

We considered using System Variable 78 (Transaction Number), which appears in the native PLD "TRANSACTION JOURNAL," but it also does not appear when added.

Our query is as follows:

  • Is it possible to add this field to the PLD "INVENTORY POSTING LIST" in the "REPETITIVE AREA"?
  • Or is there some kind of restriction?

SAP Business One

entry.title: single PO item multiple AP Invoices
entry.content:
Hi All

How to trace and list in Query a single item in PO with 10 Quantities copied to multiple AP Invoices with only one most recent Target Document Entry Number displayed in Target Key Reference?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: he database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will be c
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please help me resoving this error in SAP B1

All of my clients is having a problem with SAP Business One.

The message "The database structure has been modified. In order to resume this process, all open windows will be closed,Do you want to continue adding the user-defined field"  When they click "Ok", the message is displayed endlessly. The only way is to interrupt SAP Business One through the task manager.

Most of the time the message appears when there is a period of inactivity on the PC or network interruption .

The perform data check option is not enabled on the database.

They are on SAP Business One (SQL Server), Version 10 FP 2208 

Is someone facing the same problem? Do you have any ideas to help me solve this problem please?
